creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
Mike, this shar is incorrect. First, it tries to write to /usr/ports. 
Secondly, I get these errors after manually editing the shar:

 > make all
"Makefile", line 28: Need an operator
"Makefile", line 31: Need an operator
"Makefile", line 33: Need an operator
"Makefile", line 36: Missing dependency operator
"Makefile", line 37: Missing dependency operator
"Makefile", line 39: Missing dependency operator

Could you please recheck the content and resubmit it as a gzipped 
tarball, please?

Thanks in advance,

-- 
Gabor Kovesdan
FreeBSD Volunteer

EMAIL: gabor@FreeBSD.org .:|:. gabor@kovesdan.org
WEB:   http://people.FreeBSD.org/~gabor .:|:. http://kovesdan.org
